basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology, Banaras Hindu University
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 24-07-2026.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Applicable as per Government of India (GoI) norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. in Electrical Engineering with specialization in Power System/Power Electronics/Control System or equivalent (minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6) OR B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in Electrical Engineering /allied branches with a minimum of 75% marks or 7.5 CPI and more than two years of professional experience. Must have qualified GATE/NET.
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E. in Electrical Engineering with specialization in Power System/Power Electronics/Control System or equivalent (minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6 on a 10 point scale) B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in Electrical Engineering /allied branches with a minimum of 75% marks or 7.5 CPI on a 10 point scale and more than two years of professional experience Qualified GATE/NET

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA (Years 1-2, as JRF); Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA (Year 3, on upgradation to SRF)
salary_details.details: Years 1-2 (as JRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA Year 3 (on upgradation to SRF): Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU JRF position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Tech./M.E. in Electrical Engineering with a specialization in Power System/Power Electronics/Control System or equivalent, or a B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering/allied branches with at least 75% marks and over two years of experience. GATE/NET qualification is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: For the first two years (as JRF), the salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA. Upon upgradation to SRF in the third year, the salary increases to Rs. 42,000/- per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for the IIT BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is via email. Interested candidates need to send their complete application as a single PDF file to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all relevant qualification certificates, marksheets, experience certificates, age-proof, and other supporting documents in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project for which this JRF position is being advertised?
faq.answer: This JRF position is for a project funded by ANRF (ARG) in the Department of Electrical Engineering at IIT BHU.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct download link is provided.
